title: Name column auto-shifting to the end of a view
excerpt: Views have been randomly shifting the Name column (the first column) to the end. It isn’t all views, and isn’t on the main board. I have to delete and recreate the view to resolve the issue but I’m hoping something else …

posts.author: matt.snell (Matt Snell)
posts.cookedHtml:
Views have been randomly shifting the Name column (the first column) to the end. It isn’t all views, and isn’t on the main board. I have to delete and recreate the view to resolve the issue but I’m hoping something else can be done to fix. Has anyone else seen this before?

Screen Shot 2022-11-14 at 5.25.22 PM2464×432 36.2 KB

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @matt.snell, it seems like this might be a bug that our technical team will need to investigate as this is definitely not expected behaviour! Would you be happy to reach out to support@monday.com so our team can gather the relevant details for our specialists to look into?
